column1: # Matches the layout the deployed CoreInk is running (spiffs/LittleFS at 0x3A0000)
# so an app-only flash NEVER relocates the filesystem and the on-device WiFi
# creds / /bruce.conf survive. app0 3.5625MB easily fits the ~2.6MB build.
# Do NOT switch this board to the shared custom_4Mb_full.csv (spiffs 0x3D0000):
# that relocation wipes the device config on flash. See UNIFY/regression report.
